benefits.description: Two back-to-back days of lifted depression veil; significant mental energy restoration after two months of severe mental energy depression
Strong mental energy return after extended depressed state

protocol_notes: Protocol based on mitochondrial fission/fusion cycle inspired by Turnbuckle's Longecity forum post, combined with supplements, SS-31, and NAD+. Patient was weaned off Seroquel and placed on Remeron prior to this protocol. Also using CreGAAtine (creatine monohydrate + Guanidinoacetic Acid). Theoretical basis involves PINK1-Parkin mitophagy pathway, cardiolipin stabilization, ETC efficiency, and ROS reduction in bipolar disorder context.
